untranslatable_reason: Diamond Top pattern detection requires multi-bar shape recognition and dome-shaped volume analysis which cannot be expressed with single-bar indicators. The pattern itself (diamond formation with 4 pivot points A-B-C-D and dome-volume characteristic) requires pattern recognition logic beyond available operators. Breakout point C relative to formation height (A-B) calculation also requires historical pattern state tracking not available in single-condition rules.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using pivot-based breakout (close below pivot as proxy for breakout below support) and volume ratio spike (vol_ratio_20 > 1.0 as dome-volume proxy). Exit condition reverses to close above pivot. Stop loss set conservatively at 2.0% given 69% success rate and 17% average decline. However, the core pattern recognition and geometric measurement (formation height subtraction from breakout price) cannot be reliably expressed without shape-detection capabilities.
